aesthetic: American heritage luxury jewelry, iconic robin’s-egg blue, timeless diamonds and precious metals, modern classics (T, Knot, Lock, HardWear)
clientele: gift buyers, bridal and milestone jewelry shoppers, collectors of signature Tiffany lines, design-conscious luxury consumers
avoided_sources: unrelated fashion hauls with no jewelry signal
clienteling_tone: warm, celebratory, precise about materials and occasions; confident in heritage without being stiff

aesthetic_pillars.name: Heritage & craft
